CREATE TABLE numbers_a (id INT, value INT);
CREATE TABLE numbers_b (id INT, value INT);
SELECT a.value ^ b.value FROM numbers_a a JOIN numbers_b b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT (a.value ^ b.value) * 2 AS result FROM numbers_a a JOIN numbers_b b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT a.value, b.value, a.value ^ b.value AS xor_result FROM numbers_a AS a CROSS JOIN numbers_b AS b;
SELECT (SELECT value FROM numbers_a WHERE id = 1) ^ (SELECT value FROM numbers_b WHERE id = 1) AS xor_single_value;
SELECT (SELECT SUM(value) FROM numbers_a) ^ (SELECT SUM(value) FROM numbers_b) AS total_xor;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM numbers_a) ^ (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM numbers_b) AS count_xor;
SELECT id, (value ^ (SELECT MAX(value) FROM numbers_b)) AS xor_with_max FROM numbers_a;
CREATE TABLE combined_table AS SELECT a.value, b.value, a.value ^ b.value AS xor_result FROM numbers_a a, numbers_b b;
SELECT id, xor_result FROM combined_table WHERE xor_result > 10;
